Description: User can sign in with a valid email and password
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter valid password 4. Click Login

Summary: Verify error toast on invalid password
Description: Invalid password shows an error toast
Steps: 1. Open login page 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter wrong password 4. Click Login

Description: Coupon code applies a discount at checkout
Steps: 1. Go to cart 2. Wait for coupon banner 3. Enter SAVE10 in #coupon-input 4. Click Apply
